# `liber:config@1`

Generated reference for the `liber:config` package (`config.lsidl`). See [the LSIDL language](../../../LSIDL.md).

LiberSystem config package - configuration and file picker services.

## Imports

- `error` from [`liber:base@1`](/docs/gen/liber/base/v1.md)
- `file as storage-file` from [`liber:storage@1`](/docs/gen/liber/storage/v1.md)

## Types

### record `config-entry`

One configuration node: a dotted-path key (the tree path, e.g. "system.name") and its string value. The hierarchy lives in the key; the typed entry is the node - configuration is structured data, never parsed from text.

| field | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `key` | `string` |  |
| `value` | `string` |  |

### record `picked`

A file the user picked: a capability to its bytes (transferred out-of-band as handle<file>) plus its length and name. The capability is granted by the act of picking - the powerbox pattern, where authority flows from the user's choice rather than from ambient filesystem access.

| field | type | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `file` | `handle<storage-file>` |  |
| `size` | `u64` |  |
| `name` | `string` |  |

## Interfaces

### interface `config`

The Config service contract: read a node by key, enumerate the whole tree, or write a node. Configuration is a typed tree, not a parsed text file; a textual form would only ever be an editable representation of these nodes.

Request `[op u16][corr u32][args]`, reply `[corr u32][result]`.

| op | method | signature | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `get` | `get(key: string) -> result<string, error>` |  |
| 2 | `list` | `list() -> result<list<config-entry>, error>` |  |
| 3 | `set` | `set(entry: config-entry) -> result<unit, error>` |  |

### interface `picker`

The file-picker contract: `pick` prompts the user and hands back the chosen file as a capability. A caller with no filesystem access gains access to exactly the picked file, and to nothing else.

Request `[op u16][corr u32][args]`, reply `[corr u32][result]`.

| op | method | signature | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `pick` | `pick() -> result<picked, error>` |  |
